title: Sony and Xbox face lawsuits and criticism for their bet on the digital format, while God of War Laufey confirms its physical edition
summary: The transition towards digital games triggers a lawsuit against PlayStation, analysis on the disappearance of discs, a court order against Xbox, and the promise that the next God of War will have a physical version.

title: Steam records a record billing year in 2026 driven by expensive games
summary: Valve's platform achieves its highest annual profit thanks to high-priced titles, while players also show interest in old releases.

title: Riot Games announces the release date of League of Legends Classic with community-voted patches
summary: The classic mode of the popular MOBA will allow players to decide updates, similar to Old School RuneScape, reviving the original experience.

title: Christopher Nolan says new generations reject artificial intelligence in cinema
summary: The director praises the success of 'The Backrooms' and states that young people judge AI-generated content immediately and harshly.

title: Bethesda employees protest against Microsoft after Xbox layoffs, and studios reduce their staff
summary: Bethesda workers demonstrate against Microsoft while the Elder Scrolls Online studio confirms it has returned to its size of a decade ago due to cuts.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced now available with option to remove yellow filter
summary: The return of Ubisoft's classic pirate game allows players to modify the visual filter and has generated nostalgia among fans.

title: Palworld dominates Steam with the release of its feature-packed version 1.0
summary: The survival game achieves great success on Steam thanks to the new features included in its full update.

title: Helldivers 2 takes action against fraudulent use of premium currency
summary: The developer of the successful title cooperates with the community to eliminate suspicious activities, although players criticize how tedious it is to earn the currency.

title: Valve redesigns Counter-Strike 2's bomb making it more spectacular but less lethal
summary: The new bomb mechanic in CS2 seeks to improve visual spectacle although it reduces its destructive potential.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 raises $2.4 million for Doctors Without Borders
summary: The annual charity speedrunning event once again breaks fundraising records for the humanitarian organization.

title: UNLIMIT and DarkAngel crowned champions of the Esports World Cup in Paris
summary: The esports teams win the titles in the competition held in Paris, excelling in their respective disciplines.

title: Warframe announces a major new chapter, a card minigame, and collaboration with Fortnite
summary: The popular action game reveals massive content to keep players interested, including an alliance with Fortnite.

title: 'Moana's poor box office performance suggests a decade is too soon for a Disney remake
summary: The live-action version of Moana does not meet box office expectations, raising doubts about Disney's remake strategy.

title: Matt Damon jokes about being stranded again after the success of 'The Odyssey'
summary: The actor responds to memes about his repeated rescue stories in space and expresses his desire to participate in more survival movies.

title: Experts believe Ceres may have been habitable in the past, according to Amazon's sci-fi series
summary: An analysis of the series suggests that the dwarf planet Ceres may have harbored life, based on scientific data presented in the fiction.

title: Obsidian director gets tired of unfounded criticism about the state of the studio
summary: The veteran developer defends Obsidian's trajectory from KotOR2 to its current games, asking to stop spreading negative rumors.

title: The voice actor for Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis finishes recording sessions
summary: The development of the new Tomb Raider game progresses with the completion of the protagonist's voice recordings.

title: Eiichiro Oda fulfills a curse in One Piece chapter 1,188 and confirms an important theory
summary: The One Piece mangaka once again makes a fan prediction come true, revealing a long-awaited secret in the story.

title: Naruto comes to Spanish cinemas for the first time with a film that corrects a major mistake by Kishimoto
summary: The film premieres in Spanish theaters and offers the story the author always wanted to tell to correct a plot flaw.

title: Christopher Nolan's first film is available for free to be rediscovered
summary: The director's first feature film, 'Following', can be watched for free, offering a unique opportunity for film fans.
